title: FairQE: Multi-Agent Framework for Mitigating Gender Bias in Translation Quality Estimation
summary: Quality Estimation (QE) aims to assess machine translation quality without reference translations, but recent studies have shown that existing QE models exhibit systematic gender bias. In particular, they tend to favor masculine realizat...
